title: COUNTY CORRECTIONS INFORMATION - 211info
text: OREGON DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS COUNTY CORRECTIONS INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about community corrections including supervision, community-based sanctions, and services directed at offenders who have committed felony crimes and have been placed under supervision by the courts (probation), the Board of Parole and Post-Prison Supervision, or the local supervisory authority (parole/post-prison supervision). 3723 Fairview Industrial Drive SE 200 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 945-9090 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 945-9090 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: County Correctional Facilities Parole Probation Other Services Offered At This Location: CRIMINAL CORRECTIONAL SYSTEM - OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - VISOR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS
